title: Obsidian Pack
body:
# Obsidian Pack

This modpack focuses on optimizing Minecraft’s performance while adding useful client-side utilities to enhance the vanilla multiplayer experience. It includes carefully selected mods that boost FPS and reduce lag, ensuring smoother gameplay across a variety of hardware.

Along with performance improvements, the pack provides practical conveniences like Shulker Box tooltips, MiniHud, and other helpful tools — all designed to improve player experience without altering vanilla gameplay.

Maintained with simplicity and easy updates in mind, this modpack is perfect for those who want better performance and handy features while keeping the classic vanilla feel.
